description_long: This pedestrian adult is depicted as a youthful, urban character with a punk-inspired aesthetic. The individual has a lean build and is adorned with multiple tattoos on the arms and shoulders, as well as several necklaces and bracelets. Their outfit consists of a sleeveless, torn top, fingerless gloves, and layered shorts with visible straps and pouches, giving a rugged, streetwise appearance. The character's most striking feature is their long, intricately braided hair that extends well past the waist, accentuated by beads and bands. Heavy boots with thick soles and laces complete the look, while arm guards and a belt with pouches add to the utilitarian style. The overall impression is of a confident, expressive person likely to be seen in alternative or creative urban environments.
description: A lean, tattooed urban adult with long braided hair, punk-style clothing, and heavy boots, accessorized with gloves, arm guards, and pouches.
description_view_0: Front view shows facial features, tattoos, layered clothing, gloves, and accessories clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long braid, arm tattoos, and the profile of the boots and arm guards.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the braids, back tattoos, and the layered shorts and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals additional tattoos, the side profile of the face, and the arm accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: punk-inspired sleeveless top, layered shorts with straps, fingerless gloves, arm guards, and utility belt with pouches
attribute_hairstyle: very long, tightly braided hair with multiple braids
